package_title: I will deploy an autonomous DevOps monitoring & fix agent
description:
🔧 I will deploy an autonomous DevOps monitoring & fix agent

I deliver an agent that watches your repos/services, runs checks, and opens fix PRs or alerts on failure using n8n + your verify-untested-repo + codebase-inspection + Flowise — all free.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $1,200-$3,500 setup + $399-$1,200/mo retainer
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($300, 5 days, 1 rev): Single agent, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($1200, 10 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 agents, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($2400, 14 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited agents, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the autonomous agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
